Coffee Table Decor

Best Tabletop Water Fountain — Homedics Silver Springs Zen Decor

Bring instant calm to your space with this 3-tier waterfall fountain featuring natural river rocks and a deep basin. The automatic pump keeps the flow smooth and quiet, while the lighted, corded 8.25" design makes a soothing accent for your coffee table, desk, or living room shelf.
